# Inbox card fields

Schema fields for Inbox cards under `inbox/`. The source of truth is
`src/.memoria/schemas/types/`; this page is the generated lookup view for the
PI-facing card shapes. The daily **Needs me** view embeds only proposed
`candidate`, `gap`, and `work-prompt` cards. `flag` and `alert` cards remain
Inbox cards, but Maintenance owns their drift and health views unless they raise
a work prompt.

**Generated.** The card tables below are regenerated by
`python scripts/gen_reference_refs.py --write`; edit the type schemas, not the
tables.

<!-- REFERENCE:START -->
<!-- Generated by scripts/gen_reference_refs.py; edit schema sources instead. -->

Generated from Inbox schemas in `src/.memoria/schemas/types`.

## `alert`

- Initial lifecycle: `proposed`
- Lifecycle values: `proposed` · `current` · `archived`
- Required-any: -

| Field | Kind | Requirement | Enum values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `type` | `literal:alert` | required | - |
| `lifecycle` | `enum:lifecycle` | required | `proposed` · `current` · `archived` |
| `title` | `str` | required | - |
| `finding` | `str` | required | - |
| `target` | `str` | optional | - |
| `agent_recommendation` | `enum:agent_recommendation` | optional | `inconclusive` · `issues-found` · `clean` |
| `raised_by` | `str` | optional | - |
| `loudness` | `enum:loudness` | optional | `quiet` · `notice` · `alert` · `block` |
| `sample` | `bool` | optional | - |
| `created` | `date` | optional | - |
